settings.hero_headline: Stock the Chews That Dogs Love & Owners Trust
settings.hero_subtext: Partner with Prime Pet Food for premium Himalayan yak chews — ethically sourced, quality-checked, and built to drive repeat purchases at your store.
settings.benefit_1_text: Volume-based discounts up to 40% off retail
settings.benefit_2_text: Start with just 1 case pack per size
settings.why_title: Built for Retailers Who Want Better Margins
settings.why_subtitle: Every part of our wholesale program is designed to make stocking, selling, and reordering effortless.
settings.why_text_1: Long-lasting chews drive organic repeat purchases — customers keep coming back without heavy promotions.
settings.why_text_2: No odor, no crumbs, no mess. Virtually zero returns for your store.
settings.why_text_3: Every order arrives UPC-labeled and display-ready. From box to shelf in minutes.
settings.why_text_4: Orders ship from our US warehouse within 24–48 hours. Never miss a selling day.
settings.why_text_5: Every batch third-party tested and traceable for uniform sizing and safety.
settings.why_text_6: Start with low minimums and grow with confidence. Tiered pricing rewards volume.
settings.how_title: From Application to First Delivery in Days
settings.how_subtitle: No long onboarding. No complicated contracts. Just apply and start selling.
settings.step_1_text: Fill out the quick form with your business details — takes under 2 minutes.
settings.step_2_text: Our team reviews and approves applications within 24 hours, usually same day.
settings.step_3_text: Get access to exclusive wholesale pricing and place your first order instantly.
settings.step_4_text: Receive shelf-ready products and watch them move off your shelves.
settings.testimonial_1_quote: We started carrying Prime Pet yak chews and they quickly became our top seller. Customers keep returning — the product practically sells itself.
settings.testimonial_2_quote: The wholesale process is seamless. Fast shipping, beautiful packaging, and quality is always consistent batch after batch.
settings.testimonial_3_quote: Low MOQ let us test without risk. Within a month we tripled our order. Margins are excellent and support is always there.
settings.faq_q_1: What is the minimum order quantity?
settings.faq_a_1: Our MOQ is just 1 case pack per size or flavor. Test with minimal risk before scaling.
settings.faq_a_2: All orders ship from our US warehouse within 24–48 hours. Most domestic orders arrive within 3–5 business days.
settings.faq_a_3: Yes — tiered wholesale pricing based on order size. The more you order, the better your per-unit cost.
settings.faq_a_4: Every chew comes UPC-labeled and retail-ready. Case packs are designed for immediate shelving.
settings.faq_a_5: 24 months when stored in a cool, dry place. No refrigeration required.
settings.faq_a_6: We offer private-label options for qualifying partners. Reach out after approval.
settings.form_title: Ready to Grow Your Pet Business?
settings.form_subtitle: Complete the application and our team will get back to you within 24 hours with your custom wholesale pricing.
settings.perk_3: Free samples available for qualified retailers
settings.perk_4: Dedicated support via phone, email & WhatsApp

settings.hero_title: Stock the chews dogs keep coming back for.
settings.hero_text: Premium Himalayan yak chews with warm, retail-ready packaging, strong margins, and a real sourcing story your customers can believe in.
settings.panel_title: Built for stores that want better repeat sales.
settings.story_p1: High in the Himalayan mountains of Nepal, yak herders have made churpi for generations as both sustenance and trade.
settings.story_p2: We bring that traditional craft to modern pet retail: simple ingredients, long-lasting chew time, and a sourcing story that feels premium without feeling overproduced.
settings.story_quote: My family has made churpi for five generations. Now our work reaches dogs around the world.
settings.edge_title: A shelf-ready product with a story, margin, and repeat demand.
settings.edge_text: Designed for pet stores, groomers, clinics, and online retailers who want a premium chew that does not feel generic.
settings.edge_1_text: UPC-labeled, clean packaging, and ready to place on shelf or ship online.
settings.edge_2_text: Tiered pricing helps you protect margin as volume grows.
settings.edge_3_text: Long-lasting chews bring customers back without needing constant discounting.
settings.edge_4_text: A natural chew customers can understand quickly at point of sale.
settings.edge_5_text: Quick fulfillment helps you avoid empty shelves during demand spikes.
settings.edge_6_text: Direct support for product questions, ordering, and wholesale growth.
settings.compare_title: Why yak chews earn better shelf space.
settings.compare_text: A simple comparison your team can understand and your customers can feel confident about.
settings.lineup_text: Start with bestsellers or stock the full range for every breed size.
settings.product_1_desc: A friendly entry size for small breeds and pups.
settings.product_2_desc: The core bestseller for everyday chewers.
settings.product_3_desc: Extra-dense sizing for stronger chewing habits.
settings.product_4_desc: A longer-lasting option for large breeds.
settings.product_5_desc: Built for serious chewers and big breeds.
settings.process_title: From application to first delivery in days.
settings.process_text: Simple onboarding, clear pricing, and fast fulfillment so you can start selling quickly.
settings.step_1_text: Submit your business details in the wholesale form.
settings.step_2_text: Our team reviews most applications within 24 hours.
settings.step_3_text: Receive wholesale rates, case packs, and ordering guidance.
settings.step_4_text: Stock shelf-ready chews and reorder as demand grows.
settings.faq_title: Everything you need to know before applying.
settings.faq_text: Keep the buying decision simple for your team. These are the questions most wholesale partners ask first.
settings.faq_1_q: What is the minimum order quantity?
settings.faq_1_a: You can start with one case, making it easy to test demand before scaling.
settings.faq_2_a: Most wholesale orders ship within 24–48 hours after confirmation.
settings.faq_3_a: Yes. Products are designed for clean shelf presentation and easy customer understanding.
settings.faq_4_a: Yes. Pricing improves as your monthly case volume increases.
settings.faq_5_a: Yes. We support physical stores, online retailers, clinics, groomers, and distributors.
settings.faq_6_a: Yes. Our team can help with product questions, ordering, and choosing the right starting mix.
settings.form_title: Ready to stock Prime Pet Food?
settings.form_text: Complete the short form and our wholesale team will reach out with pricing, case options, and next steps.
settings.form_note: We usually respond within 24 hours. Your information is kept confidential.

settings.hero_headline: The chew that sells itself — and lifts your margins doing it.
settings.hero_subtext: Premium Himalayan yak chews with retail-ready packaging, low MOQs, and tiered wholesale pricing built for stores that care about repeat customers.
settings.pricecard_foot: Custom pricing for distributors. Apply to unlock.
settings.compare_title: Why retailers are dropping rawhide and bully sticks.
settings.compare_subtitle: Same shelf space, better economics, fewer customer complaints. Here's how Himalayan yak chews stack up against the chews you've been carrying.
settings.catalog_title: Five SKUs to cover every customer.
settings.catalog_subtitle: From puppies to jumbo breeds — stock the full lineup or start with the bestseller. Every case ships UPC-labeled and shelf-ready.
settings.catalog_1_desc: 1–15 lb dogs. Softer texture, full flavor.
settings.catalog_3_desc: 35–55 lb dogs. Extra-dense for aggressive chewers.
settings.catalog_4_desc: 55–85 lb dogs. Lasts weeks, not days.
settings.catalog_5_desc: 85+ lb breeds. Built for serious chewing.
settings.benefits_title: Built to be the easiest brand on your shelf.
settings.benefit_1_text: Volume discounts up to 40% off retail. The more you stock, the higher your margins.
settings.benefit_2_text: Start with just 1 case pack per size. Test before you scale.
settings.benefit_3_text: Ships from our US warehouse within 24–48 hours. Free shipping on $300+ orders.
settings.benefit_4_text: UPC-labeled, retail-ready case packs. From box to shelf in minutes.
settings.benefit_5_text: Personal support via phone, email & WhatsApp. We answer fast.
settings.benefit_6_text: Every batch third-party tested. Consistent sizing, safety, and density.
